name: Kris Murphy
subject: No days off. 2020 Starts NOW.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
Dear Peter,

There are no “off” years.

2019 doesn’t have a presidential election, but that doesn’t mean the work stops. In fact, 2019 will be an incredibly important year where we focus on local races and lay the groundwork for 2020. In order to start 2019 strong, it’s critical that we need to reach our end-of-year fundraising goal. To do this, we need to raise at least $25,000 before December 31.

We have strong, well-qualified candidates running in our two special elections this spring, and we are focused on starting early to recruit bold, strong Democratic leaders across Tennessee to run for office in 2020!

Can you pitch in $25, $35, or $100 right now? act.myngp.com/Forms/6954468427655547904?am=&recipientId=doZJ6YKx7OmgZuUmf0osx1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

Your contribution will help us recruit Democratic candidates who will fight to expand access to quality healthcare, confront voter suppression, and stand up for public education and our public school teachers.

Your $35 donation helps support our critical early recruitment efforts.

Thank you,

Kris Murphy
Senior Political Director, Tennessee Democratic Party

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE |
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Tennessee Democratic Party
1900 Church Street, Suite 203
Nashville TN 37203 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/kTt5KzgfHEEhEPU5zkeOP5Qj3KZz3b2g9kzV1w_fCvM=/-6gHLUGKJbT0AzdF8IxjOSCSu8E-huz_Ym6TmNTzh2w=.
